title: February 28
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|February|hide30=yes|hide31=yes}}

'''February 28''' is the 59th day of the year. There are 306 days remaining, 307 in leap years. In a common year it is the last day of February.</noinclude>
*[[1930s#1932|1932]] – [[Don Francks]] is born.
*[[1940s#1940|1940]] – [[Jim Baikie]] is born.
*[[1950s#1956|1956]] – [[Lloyd Sherr]] is born.
*[[1960s#1965|1965]] – [[Rajia Baroudi]] is born.
*[[1980]] – [[Denise Gough]] is born.
*[[1983]] – ''[[The Empire Strikes Back (radio)|The Empire Strikes Back:]]'' "[[A Question of Survival]]" aired on [[National Public Radio]].
*[[1997]] – ''[[The Truce at Bakura]]'' [[Wikipedia:United Kingdom|UK]] paperback published.
*[[1998]] – [[Star Wars: Rebellion (video game)|''Star Wars: Rebellion'']] released on the PC platform.
*[[1999]] – ''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' released on the PC platform.
*[[2001]] – [[Star Wars (1998) 27|''Star Wars'' (1998) 27]] published.
*[[2002]] – ''[[HoloNet News Vol. 531 45]]'' published.
*[[2003]] – [[Harrison Davis]] is born.
*[[2005]] – ''[[Star Wars: Republic Commando]]'' released on the [[Wikipedia:Xbox|Xbox]] and PC platforms.
*[[2006]] – ''[[Republic Commando: Triple Zero]]'' published.
*[[2007]] – [[Knights of the Old Republic 14|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 14]] published.
*[[2008]] – ''[[The Queen of Air and Darkness]]'' third adventure in the ''[[Dawn of Defiance]]'' campaign published.
*[[2017]] – ''[[Star Wars: Darth Vader Vol. 2]]'' hardcover published.
*2017 – ''[[Darth Vader: Sith Lord]]'' published.
*2017 – [[Star Wars Insider 171|''Star Wars Insider'' 171]] published.
*[[2018]] – [[Darth Vader (2017) 12|''Darth Vader'' (2017) 12]] published.
*[[2020]] – "[[A Distant Echo]]" airs on [[Disney+]].
*[[2022]] – "[[Star Wars Inside Intel: Quinlan Vos|''Star Wars'' Inside Intel: Quinlan Vos]]" published on [[StarWars.com]].
*[[2023]] – ''[[Star Wars: The High Republic: Chronicles of the Jedi]]'' published in the United Kingdom.
*[[2024]] – "[[A Different Approach]]" airs on Disney+.
*2024 – [[Thrawn: Alliances 2|''Thrawn: Alliances'' 2]] published.
